description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build-shelly-homekit that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix strategy across multiple Shelly models with an ubuntu-22.04 environment. For each model, check out the code, optionally build a Docker image, install the mos build tool, build the model, and upload the firmware artifacts. Then, in a separate ubuntu-latest job that depends on the build job, merge all the artifacts into a single upload.
